documentation:
% SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2021 The meson-python developers

% SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

# meson-python

`meson-python` is a Python build back-end built on top of the [Meson](https://mesonbuild.com/)
build system. It enables using Meson for the configuration and build
steps of Python packages. Meson is an open source build system meant
to be both extremely fast, and, even more importantly, as user
friendly as possible. `meson-python` is best suited for building
Python packages containing extension modules implemented in languages
such as C, C++, Cython, Fortran, Pythran, or Rust. Consult the
[documentation](https://mesonbuild.com/meson-python/) for more details.

Questions regarding the use of `meson-python` can be directed to the
[discussions](https://github.com/mesonbuild/meson-python/discussions/) space on GitHub. Bug reports and feature requests can be
filed as GitHub [issues](https://github.com/mesonbuild/meson-python/issues/).

documentation: Context manager helper to change the current working directory -- cd.

functions.name: mesonpy._util.create_targz
documentation: Opens a .tar.gz file in the file system for edition..

documentation:
Implement the wheel package binary distribution format.

https://packaging.python.org/en/latest/specifications/binary-distribution-format/

modules.name: mesonpy._editable
documentation: This file should be standalone! It is copied during the editable hook installation.

classes.name: mesonpy._editable.Node
documentation: Tree structure to store a virtual filesystem view.

modules.name: mesonpy
documentation:
Meson Python build backend

Implements PEP 517 hooks.

functions.name: mesonpy._map_to_wheel
documentation: Map files to the wheel, organized by wheel installation directory.

functions.name: mesonpy._use_ansi_escapes
documentation: Determine whether logging should use ANSI escapes.

functions.name: mesonpy._showwarning
documentation: Callable to override the default warning handler, to have colored output.

functions.name: mesonpy._is_native
documentation: Check if file is a native file.

functions.name: mesonpy._validate_config_settings
documentation: Validate options received from build frontend.

functions.name: mesonpy._project
documentation: Create the project given the given config settings.

functions.name: mesonpy._get_meson_command
documentation: Return the command to invoke meson.

functions.name: mesonpy._env_ninja_command
documentation: Returns the path to ninja, or None if no ninja found.

variables.name: mesonpy._MESON_REQUIRED_VERSION
documentation: keep in sync with the version requirement in pyproject.toml

methods.name: mesonpy.style.strip
documentation: Strip ANSI escape sequences from string.

classes.name: mesonpy.MesonBuilderError
documentation: Error when building the Meson package.

methods.name: mesonpy.Metadata._update_dynamic
documentation: Local fix for a bug in pyproject-metadata. See

methods.name: mesonpy.Metadata.distribution_name
documentation: Name to be used in wheel and sdist file names.

classes.name: mesonpy._WheelBuilder

methods.name: mesonpy._WheelBuilder._pure
documentation: Whether the wheel is architecture independent

methods.name: mesonpy._WheelBuilder.name
documentation: Wheel name, this includes the basename and tag.

methods.name: mesonpy._WheelBuilder._install_path
documentation: Add a file to the wheel.
Helper class to build wheels from projects.

classes.name: mesonpy.Project

methods.name: mesonpy.Project._manifest
documentation: The files to be added to the wheel, organized by wheel path.

methods.name: mesonpy.Project.sdist
documentation: Generates a sdist (source distribution) in the specified directory.

methods.name: mesonpy.Project.wheel
documentation: Generates a wheel in the specified directory.

methods.name: mesonpy.Project.editable
documentation: Generates an editable wheel in the specified directory.
Meson project wrapper to generate Python artifacts.
